name: smartfleet-dispatch-portfolio
description: Full-stack ready-mix concrete dispatch platform — 6 bounded-context microservices

scripts.install:all: for dir in order-ticket-load-core navixy-telematics-bridge dispatch-control-tower customer-visibility-portal analytics-integration-hub plant-edge-ot-bridge; do echo "Installing $dir..." && (cd $dir && npm install); done
scripts.build:all: for dir in order-ticket-load-core navixy-telematics-bridge dispatch-control-tower customer-visibility-portal analytics-integration-hub plant-edge-ot-bridge; do echo "Building $dir..." && (cd $dir && npm run build); done
scripts.test:all: for dir in order-ticket-load-core navixy-telematics-bridge dispatch-control-tower customer-visibility-portal analytics-integration-hub plant-edge-ot-bridge; do echo "\n--- $dir ---" && (cd $dir && npm test); done
scripts.lint:all: for dir in order-ticket-load-core navixy-telematics-bridge dispatch-control-tower customer-visibility-portal analytics-integration-hub plant-edge-ot-bridge; do echo "Linting $dir..." && (cd $dir && npm run lint); done
scripts.typecheck:all: for dir in order-ticket-load-core navixy-telematics-bridge dispatch-control-tower customer-visibility-portal analytics-integration-hub plant-edge-ot-bridge; do echo "Typechecking $dir..." && (cd $dir && npx tsc --noEmit); done
scripts.migrate:all: for dir in order-ticket-load-core navixy-telematics-bridge dispatch-control-tower customer-visibility-portal analytics-integration-hub plant-edge-ot-bridge; do echo "Migrating $dir..." && (cd $dir && npm run migrate); done
scripts.seed:all: for dir in order-ticket-load-core navixy-telematics-bridge dispatch-control-tower customer-visibility-portal analytics-integration-hub plant-edge-ot-bridge; do echo "Seeding $dir..." && (cd $dir && npm run seed); done
